name: Ready, Set, Plumb!
short_description: Ready, Set, Plumb! is a fast-paced puzzle game, where your goal is to place the pipes on the main board to prevent the toxic leak
detailed_description:
Ready, Set, Plumb! is a fast-paced puzzle game, where your goal is to place the pipes on the main board to prevent the toxic leak. The longer the pipe, the higher the score... but you still need to keep it under control!

  • Challenge the high score
  • 120 predefined levels of increasing difficulty
  • Play freeform with randomly generated board and pipe order so no 2 games will be the same
about_the_game:
Ready, Set, Plumb! is a fast-paced puzzle game, where your goal is to place the pipes on the main board to prevent the toxic leak. The longer the pipe, the higher the score... but you still need to keep it under control!

  • Challenge the high score
  • 120 predefined levels of increasing difficulty
  • Play freeform with randomly generated board and pipe order so no 2 games will be the same
supported_languages:
English*, Japanese*, Korean*, Polish*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
